notes: Works after installing WMF (follow the instructions from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1102#issuecomment-419678627 you need a windows 7 machine/vm to copy the dlls from)

notes: The game fails to start a new game, hanging instead of playing a cutscene. Launching from a saved game after finishing the tutorial the game seems to play just like on Windows, though I haven't tested if another cutscene later on would break it again.
title: Children of Morta

notes: Game runs perfectly if you can get past the initial cut scene. I dual booted into Windows and played to the first save point and everything has worked since then. About 2 hours of playtime.
title: Children of Morta

notes: I make it past opening credits, autosave warning, to opening splash screen.  Click any key to continue takes me to main menu.  Can tinker with options. The moment I select 'new save location', the Children of Morta logo fades to a blue screen with stars.  Dramatic music plays and game hangs as music comes to an end. I do not have access to a save game file, and am not sufficiently tech savvy to navigate suggested fixes.
title: Children of Morta

notes:
Game works perfectly after adding Media Foundation support as explained here:

https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

No need to import saves from Windows with this fix.
title: Children of Morta

notes: After using the MF installer here: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-installcab I was able to run it without any issue whatsoever.
title: Children of Morta

notes:
Runs perfect after using the MF workaround described here: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install (thank you guys for the hint).
The mf-installcab version didn't work for me. But you need to start the game first to get the pfx directory.
I'm playing the game with a Xbox 360 controller. Worked out of the box without any issues.
title: Children of Morta

notes: Runs perfectly after getting a save just after the intro cinematic

notes: After installing "https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install" all worked fine
title: Children of Morta

notes: As others have already noted using the mf-install script fixes this game. I've updated the README with clearer instructions unfortunately the original maintainer did not want to accept my changes. You can find the updated README here: https://github.com/rbjorklin/mf-install/blob/readme-update/README.md
title: Children of Morta
